etymology.description: Phonetic: 𡍬 (original phonetic) + Semantic: 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry") -> reduced phonetic: 士(士) (shì, "scholar") + 四(四) (sì, "four") -> to sell; trade
etymology.interpretation: The character 𧶠 evolved from a combination of a phonetic element 𡍬 with the semantic 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry"), representing trade or items of value. The phonetic was simplified to 士 and 四, providing a new form that maintains its original sense of selling or trading.
